recommendations.title: Pledge
recommendations.overview: Three friends pledge a fraternity that's deadly serious about its secret rituals, turning their rush into a race for survival.

recommendations.title: American Pie Presents: Beta House
recommendations.overview: Erik, Ryan, and Cooze start college and pledge the Beta House fraternity, presided over by none other than legendary Dwight Stifler. But chaos ensues when a fraternity of geeks threatens to stop the debauchery and the Betas have to make a stand for t

recommendations.title: Sorority Wars
recommendations.overview: Katie, a college freshman, has been groomed from birth to continue her mother’s legacy with the Deltas. When Katie decides to pledge another house instead, an all-out sorority war commences.

recommendations.title: The Big Gundown
recommendations.overview: Unofficial lawman John Corbett hunts down Cuchillo Sanchez, a Mexican peasant accused of raping and killing a 12-year-old girl.

recommendations.title: Seems Like Old Times
recommendations.overview: After being falsely accused of robbing a bank, a writer seeks the help of his lawyer ex-wife to clear his name. However, hilarity ensues when he must hide from her husband, who’s throwing a party for law enforcement officials.

recommendations.title: Flawless
recommendations.overview: An ultraconservative police officer suffers a debilitating stroke and is assigned to a rehabilitative program that includes singing lessons - with the drag queen next door.

recommendations.title: Neighbors 2: Sorority Rising
recommendations.overview: A sorority moves in next door to the home of Mac and Kelly Radner who have a young child. The Radner's enlist their former nemeses from the fraternity to help battle the raucous sisters.

recommendations.title: Brother Bear
recommendations.overview: When an impulsive boy named Kenai is magically transformed into a bear, he must literally walk in another's footsteps until he learns some valuable life lessons. His courageous and often zany journey introduces him to a forest full of wildlife, inclu

recommendations.title: If Beale Street Could Talk
recommendations.overview: After her fiance is falsely imprisoned, a pregnant African-American woman sets out to clear his name and prove his innocence.

recommendations.title: We the Poor
recommendations.overview: Carpenter Pepe El Toro lives peacefully with his daughter Chachita in an impoverished Mexico City neighborhood. He pursues a romance with the pretty Celia, but tragedy comes knocking on his door when he is falsely accused of having perpetrated a felo
